texto: If you know something to be trueSay it onceThose who can, will receive itOnly the foolish believe they can justify a truth to a court of foolsHonor the truthFor even before a just judgeA lie can be proven to be credibleOn the other handTruth will never require a woman or man's justificationIt can stand aloneBe torn and ridiculed and even stillIt will remain True
explicacao: Citação de Gregory Warner sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “If you know something to be trueSay it onceThose who can, will receive itOnly the foolish believe…” articula reflexao, poetry, quotes-to-live-by em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como quotes-to-live-by.
